classes.reasoning: Document is explicitly titled 'ICF-006 — Re-Consent Form' with version numbering (ICF Version 2.0), contains participant and investigator signature blocks, and describes the re-consent process for enrolled participants due to a safety update.

summary: This is a re-consent form (ICF version 2.0) issued to participants already enrolled in Study BIORCE-CAR-2024-007. It informs participants of a protocol amendment requiring more frequent liver blood tests (at Weeks 4, 8, 12, and 24) due to elevated liver enzymes observed in 3 out of 189 treated patients, and obtains their consent to continue under the updated monitoring conditions.
content:
# ICF-006 — Re-Consent Form
## Study BIORCE-CAR-2024-007 — Liver Monitoring Update
### ICF Version 2.0 | Date: 20 September 2024 | CONFIDENTIAL

**Purpose:** A safety update requires that you be re-consented if you are
currently enrolled.

## What Has Changed?

### More Frequent Liver Blood Tests

During the ongoing study, 3 patients (out of 189 treated so far) had an
increase in their liver enzymes (a blood marker called ALT) to more than
5 times the upper limit of normal. In all 3 cases the levels returned to
normal after the study medicine was paused — no patient suffered lasting
liver damage. However, we want to monitor this more carefully.

**What this means for you:** You will now have liver blood tests at
**Weeks 4, 8, 12, and 24** (in addition to your regular blood tests).
This requires no extra visits — the extra tests will be done alongside
your existing blood draw at these visits.

**If your ALT rises above 5x normal:** The study medicine will be paused
and your study doctor will contact you within 48 hours. In most cases
the medicine can be safely restarted once levels return to normal.

---

**Participant Declaration:** I have read and understood the above
information. I agree to continue my participation in Study
BIORCE-CAR-2024-007 under the updated conditions.

| | |
|---|---|
| Participant Signature: | _________________________ Date: ____________ |
| Investigator Signature: | _________________________ Date: ____________ |

*ICF v2.0 supersedes v1.0 dated 01 March 2024.*
